summary: Extended the cycle record helper so generated records automatically capture git provenance and render metadata details for easier audits.
changes: Added git HEAD and dirty-state detection to scripts/cycle_record.py with graceful fallback outside git repos or when git is unavailable.
Expanded unit coverage for git metadata capture and fallback behavior in tests/test_cycle_record.py.
Documented automatic git metadata stamping in README.md.
Wrote a fresh design spec and implementation plan for the change under docs/superpowers/.
notes: Records now include repo provenance automatically when written from a git checkout.

metadata.seed: Let the cycle record helper stamp git commit hashes into metadata
